## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Valentina Giraldo Morales' potential role as a mini chief of staff at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Valentina's background in growth and process improvement aligns well with the role's needs](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [The position involves diverse responsibilities, including project management, process creation, and supporting various teams](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [growthx.ai is seeking a problem-solver who can adapt quickly and handle multiple tasks across different areas](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Work schedule and remote-first policy discussed, with potential for hybrid work](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

## Topics

### Valentina's Background and Interests

  - [Graduated 3 years ago from European business school](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Experience as growth manager for e-commerce company](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Shifted focus to internal growth and process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Interested in AI and uses it daily for work](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Enjoys problem-solving and learning new skills](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)

### Role Description and Responsibilities

  - [Mini chief of staff position, supporting George (current chief of staff)](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Tasks include:](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [Client communication and project management](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Process creation and improvement](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [Supporting various teams (e.g., growth, content)](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
      - [Organizing events and tracking projects](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Goal: Take on some of George's responsibilities to free up his time](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

### Company Tools and Processes

  - [Main tools: Notion, Slack, Linear, Adio, HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Need for improved organization and process documentation](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

      - [Creating CRM for CEO's contacts](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
      - [Sourcing and implementing new tools](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Work Schedule and Culture

  - [Remote-first company with hybrid options for some roles](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)

  - [Valentina's proposed schedule (working out at 4 AM PT) aligns well](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Problem-Solving Exercise

  - [Scenario: Increasing profits for a popular single-item restaurant](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Valentina's suggestions:](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
      - [Implement upsells (e.g., add-ons, extras)](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
      - [Consider new menu items after market research](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
      - [Use predictive modeling to prepare food in advance](https://fathom.video/share/hKttSYyCDzAiDvLdFeHxNXvziVHQsC1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
